Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Mark page items and list items in Title with score from one or multiple score variables. Use score conditions to show and hide chapters, pages or page items.

Calculation.Text: "View all page items affecting this score category"
FAT Score variable::Score icon media id

StyledText.Data: Start value Min value Max value

ScriptReference.name: TEMP fix missing Score text and Media

Calculation.Text: "View all page items using this Title Content Array"

StyledText.Data: Text and Score variables for personalisation, gamification or adaption.
Let the user earn rewards that can be visualised in hierchial badges (gold, silver, bronze) , levels or anything you come up with.
